title: elynanthus ustulatus
intro: Elynanthus ustulatus, also known as Red Alder or Red Alder Buds, is a plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America, characterized by its small, reddish-brown cones and fragrant buds. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elynanthus ustulatus include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the buds in hot water or using the dried buds in tea blends, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
